name: Hangzhou Gaoxin Rubber & Plastic Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Gaoxin Rubber & Plastic Materials Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells polymer rubber and plastic materials in China. The company offers oil and weather and UV resistant, PVC anti-ant and rat resistant, PVC cold resistant, environmentally friendly soft PVC, high flame and ultra-high flame retardant, PVC low-smoke low halogen-free cable, flame retardant PVC cable, ordinary PVC cable, ethylene propylene rubber insulation, polyvinyl chloride nitrile composite elastomer, chlorinated polyethylene rubber sheathing material, polyethylene plastic, halogen-free low-smoke flame retardant olefin cable material, two-step silane cross-linked polyethylene insulation, and one-step silane cross-linked polyethylene insulation, as well as ethylene propylene rubber inner and outer materials for nuclear power materials. It serves customers in the fields of electric power, ships, rail transit, communication, electrical equipment, construction, new energy, and others. The company was formerly known as Hangzhou Gaoxin Insulation Materials Co., Ltd. Hangzhou Gaoxin Rubber & Plastic Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Hangzhou, China.
